sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97302" key="strofiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στροφ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n97302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fit for turning, turned</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λίσχροι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
